description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Fragment (right side). Dated: Ṭevet 144[.] Seleucid = 1128–38 CE. Settlement between Sitt al-Milāḥ and her husband Ibn al-Baṣrī at the time of his absence. Signed by Avraham b. Shemaʿya and Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
